sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46484" key="zwoqhriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζωο-θηρικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ζῳο-</etym>) <sense id="n46484.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζῳοθηρία</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg007.perseus-grc1:221b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">221b</biblScope> </bibl>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ -κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">= ζῳοθηρία</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg007.perseus-grc1:220a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">220a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg007.perseus-grc1:222a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">222a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
